block_01: Psychology plays an important role in our lives. It affects most of our actions, including trading decisions. So it may be useful to understand how our brains work to control the decision-making process. By learning about psychological patterns and biases, you might avoid common trading mistakes.
block_02: Do you look for confirmations of your beliefs? Have a hard time calculating the probability of future events? Or maybe you tend to follow the herd? If you answered “Yes” to any of these questions, check out this article. It offers an overview of 3 common cognitive biases traders might face. It may give you some ideas on how to keep them from affecting your trading results.
block_05: Psychological Patterns: How to Avoid Trading Mistakes
